requirement_topic.en: Market Entry and In-Country Importer Structure
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入与境内进口商结构
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入與境內進口商結構

summary.en: Azerbaijan market entry for lithium batteries is handled through import-side governance where regulated products require an in-country importer and documentation package prepared for customs and authority checks at Baku. Importers are responsible for coordinating compliance evidence and for maintaining the required local records for post-entry controls.
summary.zh: 阿塞拜疆锂电池市场准入通常以进口端治理为主，受监管品类需境内进口商并在巴库进行清关及监管文件核验。进口商负责协调合规证据，并负责入境后的在地记录与后续合规配合。
summary.zht: 阿塞拜疆鋰電池市場准入通常以進口端治理為主，受監管品類需境內進口商並在巴庫進行清關及監管文件核驗。進口商負責協調符合性證據，並負責入境後的在地記錄與後續合規配合。

standards_or_laws: AZS/import framework and customs check requirements for regulated electrical imports
Port of entry procedures for customs and conformity review

summary.en: China domestic and export processes rely on exporter declaration and domestic safety certification paths. There is no identical legal requirement for a local importer-of-record process matching Azerbaijan customs and regulator coordination in the same form.
summary.zh: 中国国内及出口流程以出口商申报和国内认证路径为主，不存在与阿塞拜疆一致的本地记录进口商与监管协同机制。
summary.zht: 中國國內及出口流程以出口商申報和國內認證路徑為主，不存在與阿塞拜疆一致的本地記錄進口商與監管協同機制。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241 and related domestic Chinese lithium-safety baseline
CNCA/CNCA catalogue and domestic customs declaration channels

gap.en: Chinese exporters must establish Azerbaijani in-country importer readiness even when Chinese-side approvals are complete. Missing local importer readiness is a frequent entry blocker for first-time lanes, especially for Baku-based customs release and post-clearance controls.
gap.zh: 即使中国侧审批完备，仍需建立阿塞拜疆境内进口商准入能力。缺少本地进口方准备是首次出口该线路的常见准入阻滞点，尤其影响巴库清关及后续监管配合。
gap.zht: 即使中國側審批完備，仍需建立阿塞拜疆境內進口商准入能力。缺少本地進口方準備是首次出口該路線的常見准入阻滯點，尤其影響巴庫清關及後續監管配合。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for regulated import flows requiring in-country importer coordination and local record management.
mandatory_status.cn: Not directly applicable in equivalent form. China's exporter declaration model does not substitute for Azerbaijani in-country importer and local compliance workflow.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] This is a high-priority market-entry gap. Chinese exports should be paired with a qualified in-country importer and local documentation preparation for Baku entry before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 这是重要的市场准入差距。中国出口商应与合规本地进口商配合，并在发运前完成面向巴库入境口岸的文件准备。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 這是重要的市場准入差距。中國出口商應與合規本地進口商配合，並在發運前完成面向巴庫入境口岸的文件準備。
